---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "学习笔记与数学随想"
listing:
  contents: notes
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  grid-columns: 2
  page-size: 10
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon=false}
这里收集了我在学习拓扑学过程中的笔记。内容涵盖量子拓扑、高维流形、低维拓扑等主题。


:::

---

## 主题分类

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🎯 量子不变量

Khovanov homology, Turaev-Viro, Reshetikhin-Turaev

[浏览 →](notes/Khovanov_homology.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 📐 高维流形
 
 h-cobordism, surgery theory, algebraic topology

[浏览 →](notes/h_cobordism_4.qmd)
[即将更新]
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .text-center .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🔷 低维拓扑

2-manifold (mapping class group), 3-manifold, 4-manifold, Gauge theory

[即将更新]
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## 所有笔记
